<img width="256" height="256" alt="Java-Light" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c2434e41-46b9-4249-84eb-8ca048566ef5" />## Hello!

I am **Elijah Carl G. Betito**, a 3rd-Year Computer Science student currently studying at Ateneo de Naga University. Throughout my studies, I have developed an interest in Web Development and UI/UX Design, which is what I choose to pursue while expanding my learning for a more well-rounded knowledge in the field. 

Outside of academics, I dabble in creative writing and graphic design, which I sometimes try to incorporate into my studies.
